debug_info.goal:
case neg
x : IGame
p : Player
z : IGame
hy : z ∈ moves p x
h : ¬@IGame.Reversible x z p
⊢ ¬@IGame.Reversible (@IGame.unreverse x) (@IGame.unreverse z) p

failed_attempts:
intro hrev
    obtain ⟨w, hw, hwx⟩ := hrev
    rw [moves_unreverse, Set.mem_iUnion₂] at hw
    obtain ⟨u, hu, ⟨v, hv, rfl⟩⟩ := hw
    have : v ≤ x := (unreverse_equiv v).trans_le (hwx.trans (unreverse_equiv x).symm.le)
    have : u ≤ x := by
      by_cases hr : Reversible y u (-p)
      · rw [reverseSet_of_reversible hr] at hv
        cases p <;>
        · have ⟨c, hc, hyc⟩ := hr.choose_spec
          have := (left_lf hv).trans_le this
          exact (lf_of_le_of_lf hyc this).trans_le (right_le_of_left_lf hc)
      · rw [reverseSet_of_not_reversible hr] at hv
        subst hv
        exact this
    apply h
    cases p <;> exact ⟨u, hu, this⟩
